Enum agsClientError

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.GISClient
Assembly
ESRI.Server.GISClient.dll

AGS Client Error Codes.

[Guid("BE7A331D-DA86-4D87-AD71-8F9572209D94")]
public enum agsClientError

Fields

AGS_E_CONNECTION_CANCELLED = -2147199423

-2147199423: AGS Connection Dialog Cancelled

AGS_E_INSECURE_TOKENSERVICEURL = -2147199422

-2147199422: Insecure (non-https) Token Service URL.

AGS_E_NO_CONNECT_INSECURE_TOKENSERVICEURL = -2147199421

-2147199421: Did not connect due to insecure (non-https) Token Service URL.

AGS_E_REDIRECTION = -2147199419

-2147199419: The connection URL is a redirection.

AGS_E_SERVICE_STARTED_WITH_ERRORS = -2147199420

-2147199420: The service started with errors.

AGS_E_UPLOAD_IS_TOO_LARGE = -2147199418

-2147199418: The file to upload is larger than the maximum upload size defined by the service.
